fields.returns: An array of design coordinate values for the specified named instance.

entries.signature: public int GetNamedInstanceDesignCoords (int instanceIndex, Span<float> coords);

fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the font contains a COLR table with layered glyph color data; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the font contains color layer data (COLR table).

fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the font contains PNG color glyph data; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the font contains PNG color glyph data.

fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the font contains SVG color glyph data; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the font contains SVG color glyph data.

fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the font contains a CPAL table with color palettes; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the font contains color palettes (CPAL table).

fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the font contains OpenType variable font data; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the font contains OpenType variation data.

fields.value: The total number of named instances defined in the font's variation data.
fields.summary: Gets the number of named instances defined in the font.

fields.value: The total number of color palettes defined in the font's CPAL table.
fields.summary: Gets the number of color palettes available in the font.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if a variation axis with the specified tag was found; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.tag: The four-byte tag identifying the variation axis to search for.
params.axisInfo: When this method returns, contains information about the located axis if found. This parameter is treated as uninitialized.

fields.summary: Attempts to find a variation axis by its tag.

entries.signature: public bool TryFindVariationAxis (HarfBuzzSharp.Tag tag, out HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeVarAxisInfo axisInfo);
